mapper.sql: cgu.id, cgu.created_time, cgu.created_timestamp, cgu.created_by, cgu.modified_time, cgu.modified_timestamp, cgu.modified_by, cgu.version, cgu.status, cgu.nick_name, cgu.leader_flag, cgu.join_type, cgu.agree_flag, cgu.user_nick_name

cgu.id, cgu.created_time, cgu.created_timestamp, cgu.created_by, cgu.created_id, cgu.modified_time, cgu.modified_timestamp, cgu.modified_by, cgu.modified_id, cgu.deleted, cgu.version, cgu.remark, cgu.nick_name, cgu.leader_flag, cgu.join_type, cgu.agree_flag, cgu.seq, cgu.chat_group_id, cgu.user_id, cgu.user_avatar, cgu.user_nick_name, cgu.org_id
mapper.delete: delete from chat_group_user where chat_group_id in
delete from chat_group_user where id in
mapper.select:
select
from chat_group_user cgu inner join chat_group cg on cgu.chat_group_id = cg.id and cg.deleted = 0 and cg.status = 1 where cgu.deleted = 0 and cgu.org_id = #{ew.orgId} and cgu.chat_group_id = #{ew.chatGroupId} order by cgu.seq asc
